name: io.github.not-so-fat/agent-deck
title: Agent Deck
description: Local context-aware MCP proxy. One endpoint for your agent; switch MCP servers and API keys with decks.

packages.runtimeHint: Run `npx @agent-deck/cli start` locally, then connect your MCP client to the URL above.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DECK_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Backend API and dashboard port (default 11111; dev repo uses 8000)

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DECK_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: MCP HTTP endpoint port (default 11112; dev repo uses 3001)

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DECK_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Data directory for SQLite DB and credential metadata (default ~/.agent-deck)
